issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3 (early game)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3 out of the early floors (1-3). This may indicate the early game is too punishing for average profile players. Overall accuracy was 68%.

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 0: 7 turns vs prev floor avg 2.7
issues.description: Encounter 0 on floor 3 took 7 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 2.7 turns. This indicates a difficulty spike.
